ops.text: Migrate to Modular Gradle Architecture and remove legacy speedster.sh

ops.find_block:
- name: Restore Armory Cache
        id: cache-deps
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: app/build/harvested_libs
          key: armory-libs-${{ hashFiles('app/build.gradle') }}

      - name: Harvest Dependencies (If Cache Miss)
        if: steps.cache-deps.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: gradle app:harvestDeps

      - name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)
        run: |
          chmod +x speedster.sh
          ./speedster.sh

ops.text: Clean up orphaned dynamic source files with corrected paths
Fix missing gradlew exit code 127 and optimize d8 tool discovery

ops.replace_with:
- name: Forge Payload DEX
